mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM APT_ANN_BOARD_POST P INNER JOIN APT_BOARD_INSTANCE B ON P.BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO WHERE P.DEL_YN = 'N' AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.BOARD_TY_CD = 'NOTICE' AND B.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND P.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
AND P.ANN_NO LIKE '%' || #{searchAnnNo} || '%'
AND P.TTL LIKE '%' || #{searchTtl} || '%'
AND P.WRTR_ID LIKE '%' || #{searchWrtrId} || '%'
AND TRUNC(P.REG_DTTM) >= TO_DATE(#{searchStartDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(P.REG_DTTM) <= TO_DATE(#{searchEndDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND P.TOP_FIX_YN = 'Y'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ATTACH_FILE F WHERE TO_CHAR(F.FILE_GROUP_NO) = P.ATCH_FILE_ID )

/* * MEMBER.USER_NM에 이미 단지명이 포함되어 있으면 그대로 사용. * 포함되어 있지 않으면 단지명_사용자명 형태로 생성. */ SELECT CASE WHEN M.USER_NM LIKE A.APT_CMPLEX_NM || '_%' THEN M.USER_NM ELSE A.APT_CMPLEX_NM || '_' || M.USER_NM END AS WRTR_NM FROM APT_COMPLEX A INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON M.USER_NO = #{userNo} WHERE A.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo}

/* * 공지사항 기본 정보 조회 * 첨부파일은 별도 selectNoticeAttachFileList 에서 조회함 */
SELECT P.ANN_NO , P.BOARD_NO , B.APT_CMPLEX_NO , P.TTL , P.CN , P.WRTR_ID , P.REG_DTTM , P.MDF_DTTM , NVL(P.INQ_CNT, 0) AS INQ_CNT , P.DEL_YN , P.ATCH_FILE_ID , P.TOP_FIX_YN
FROM APT_ANN_BOARD_POST P INNER JOIN APT_BOARD_INSTANCE B ON P.BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO
WHERE P.ANN_NO = #{annNo} AND P.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND B.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND B.BOARD_TY_CD = 'NOTICE' AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND P.DEL_YN = 'N'

SELECT TO_CHAR(F.FILE_GROUP_NO) AS ATCH_FILE_ID , F.FILE_OG_NAME AS FILE_OG_NAME , F.FILE_PATH AS FILE_PATH , F.MIME_TYPE AS MIME_TYPE , F.GOOGLE_ID AS GOOGLE_ID FROM ATTACH_FILE F WHERE TO_CHAR(F.FILE_GROUP_NO) = #{atchFileId} ORDER BY F.FILE_SORT_ORDER ASC

SELECT MO.MGMT_OFC_NO AS mgmtOfcNo, MO.MGMT_OFC_NM AS mgmtOfcNm, MO.APT_CMPLEX_NO AS aptCmplexNo, AC.APT_CMPLEX_NM AS aptCmplexNm FROM MGMT_OFFICE MO JOIN APT_COMPLEX AC ON MO.APT_CMPLEX_NO = AC.APT_CMPLEX_NO WHERE MO.MGMT_OFC_NO = #{mgmtOfcNo}
mapper.insert: /* * MERGE란? * → 있으면 INSERT 안 하고, 없으면 INSERT 하는 Oracle 문법. * * 왜 사용? * → 글쓰기 버튼을 여러 번 눌러도 같은 게시판이 중복 생성되지 않게 하기 위해. */ MERGE INTO APT_BOARD_INSTANCE B USING ( SELECT #{aptCmplexNo} || '_notice' AS BOARD_NO, #{aptCmplexNo} AS APT_CMPLEX_NO, 'NOTICE' AS BOARD_TY_CD, '공지게시판' AS BOARD_NM, 'Y' AS USE_YN FROM DUAL ) S ON ( B.APT_CMPLEX_NO = S.APT_CMPLEX_NO AND B.BOARD_TY_CD = S.BOARD_TY_CD ) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( BOARD_NO, APT_CMPLEX_NO, BOARD_TY_CD, BOARD_NM, USE_YN ) VALUES ( S.BOARD_NO, S.APT_CMPLEX_NO, S.BOARD_TY_CD, S.BOARD_NM, S.USE_YN )
